VERDICT: UNLIKELY
EXPLANATION: The paper exists as arXiv:2503.07365v1 with the title "MM-Eureka: Exploring Visual Aha Moment with Rule-based Large-scale Reinforcement Learning," matching the cited title (modulo minor capitalization). The cited authors are a subset of the real 15-author list; the missing author is Tiancheng Han, and the title in the citation slightly differs from the later updated version but matches v1. These are minor discrepancies consistent with citing an early version, not fabrication.
LINK: https://arxiv.org/abs/2503.07365v1
